creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
Okay, my version is stale:  r286666

It does seem to have been a regression to when "M" and "G" weren't being interpreted (I can't now find that bug again). And quotes also seem to cause a problem when entering the number, which doesn't seem a good idea.  

But entering the value in bytes *without* quotes may have worked (zfs-stats is a little bit unclear about that, since it still lists 30GB as target and max which is scary)

Can I presume that it's fixed in 10.3 and later?
